description: Posts featuring specific dish recommendations with restaurant location, pricing, and item details to drive direct customer orders and restaurant visits.
structural_recipe: Feature a high-quality food image of the dish. Include restaurant name and location (street/landmark). List 3-5 specific menu items with Arabic names and prices in SAR. Tag the original restaurant or food blogger source. Use clear formatting with bullet points or line breaks for easy scanning. Include direct call-to-action through location/pricing transparency.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences heavily rely on peer recommendations and transparent pricing before dining decisions. Detailed pricing in SAR removes purchase friction. Restaurant location references anchor trust in familiar neighborhoods. Tagging original sources builds community credibility and encourages shares among local food enthusiasts.
transplantation_caveats: Prices must be clearly stated in SAR to maintain local relevance
Location references must use recognizable Saudi landmarks or street names
Ensure halal certification is implied or stated for F&B content
Peak engagement times align with Saudi meal hours (lunch 12-2pm, dinner 7-10pm KSA time)
cultural_constraints: Content must respect Islamic dietary guidelines and halal standards
Avoid pork or non-halal meat recommendations
Female-focused or mixed-gender dining venues should be clearly indicated
Pricing transparency is culturally expected in Saudi F&B recommendations
